seo.title: ArdenNest | Holiday Home for 26 guests in the Ardennes
seo.description: Quiet luxury for moments together. Holiday home with 9 bedrooms, ensuite bathrooms and professional kitchen. Welcoming families since 2003.

hero.headline: Quiet luxury for moments together
hero.subheadline: 22 years of experience welcoming families to the Ardennes

trust.capacityDetail: Mixed groups from small to large

customerJourney.title: Personal Guidance
customerJourney.description: From first contact to departure: we guide you every step of the way. Clear communication, transparent billing and personal service make the difference.
customerJourney.feature4: Forgotten items are sent back to you

kitchenPro.title: Restaurant-Grade Kitchen
kitchenPro.description: Not your typical holiday kitchen. This is restaurant-grade equipment — built to run daily for 26 people. Everything is professional quality, right down to the fire suppression system above the stove.
kitchenPro.feature1: Lacanche Cluny — restaurant-worthy stove with gastronorm oven and warming drawer
kitchenPro.feature2: 2 Miele Professional dishwashers — everything clean in 30 minutes
kitchenPro.feature3: Professional fridge and cool pantry — room for all the group's groceries
kitchenPro.feature4: Fire suppression system above the stove — safety to professional standards

gardenFull.title: The Garden
gardenFull.description: Nothing is straight, nothing is rigid. A vast rolling landscape where children disappear for hours and adults unwind. Always well-maintained, with space for everyone — from treasure hunts to pétanque, from football to aperitifs.
gardenFull.feature1: Large football field with volleyball net and pétanque lane
gardenFull.feature2: Hidden spots throughout the garden — children always discover something new
gardenFull.feature3: 3 large benches and 10 professional sun loungers with side tables in good weather
gardenFull.feature4: Terrace between house and garden with 2 barbecues — the perfect stopping point

gameRoom.title: The Games Room
gameRoom.description: A space where young and old challenge each other. From thrilling games of pool to intense table football matches.

playBarn.title: The Play Barn
playBarn.description: The former horse stable, once home to draught horses, is now a play paradise for the very young. Full of go-karts, tractors and toys for hours of fun.
playBarn.feature4: Laps on the tarmac and chalk drawing at the front of the farmhouse

differentiators.dishCabinetFeature2: Everything complete and in perfect condition

cta.title: Convinced?
cta.description: Check availability and book directly with us for the best price and personal service.

quietLuxury.title: Quiet Luxury
quietLuxury.description: Ensuite bathrooms, solid oak floors and timeless interiors. No frills, just genuine quality you can feel.

kitchen.title: Professional Kitchen
kitchen.description: 2x Miele dishwashers, Lacanche stove and everything you need to cook together for 26 people.

garden.title: Kids Paradise Garden
garden.description: 200m x 100m of space, playground equipment, football field and a treasure hunt. Kids entertain themselves for hours.

mattresses.title: Sleep in Style
mattresses.description: A good night's sleep starts with what you feel. That's why we chose De Witte Lietaer — Flemish craftsmanship you notice the moment you slip between the sheets. Waking up rested is the foundation of a successful stay.
mattresses.feature1: Boxspring beds with 25 cm thick mattresses
mattresses.feature2: Bedding and bed linen by De Witte Lietaer
mattresses.feature3: Pure cotton sateen — silky soft with a subtle sheen
mattresses.feature4: Belgian family business, quality reference since 1898

dishCabinet.title: Checked After Every Guest
dishCabinet.description: After every guest, we fully inspect the dish cabinet. Everything is complete and in perfect condition when you arrive.

professionalEquipment.title: Professional Equipment
professionalEquipment.description: Restaurant-quality pots and pans. Cook for 26 people with the right equipment.

livingOnSite.title: 25 Years On-Site
livingOnSite.description: We have lived on the estate for 25 years. Nobody knows the house and surroundings better than we do.

utilities.title: Utilities Included
utilities.description: Water, electricity and heating are included in the price. No surprises when settling up.

greenKey.title: Green Key Candidate
greenKey.description: We are working towards the Green Key label, the international eco-label for sustainable tourism.

certified.title: Certified Holiday Home
certified.description: Officially recognized and certified by Tourism Wallonia. Your guarantee for quality and reliability.

ventilation.title: Silent Central Ventilation
ventilation.description: All bathrooms are equipped with silent central ventilation. Optimal air quality without disruptive noise.

whyBookDirect.title: Why book direct?
whyBookDirect.subtitle: The benefits of booking directly with us

price.title: Best price guaranteed
price.description: No OTA commissions means the best price for you

contact.title: Direct contact with us
contact.description: Questions? We know the house like no one else
